arguments_for_no: The amendment is explicitly marked as OBSOLETE in the Known Amendments status.
The amendment has known issues, including one that can cause tecINVARIANT_FAILED errors in the ledger.
The amendment has been replaced by the NonFungibleTokensV1_1 amendment, indicating it is no longer the intended standard.

cited_facts.why_it_matters: Identifies known technical issues (tecINVARIANT_FAILED) and states that the amendment has been replaced by NonFungibleTokensV1_1.
Explicitly classifies the amendment status as OBSOLETE, indicating it should not be enabled.

output_json.decision_summary: The NonFungibleTokensV1 amendment is obsolete and has been superseded by NonFungibleTokensV1_1 due to known technical issues. Validators should not vote to enable this outdated and potentially problematic amendment.
output_json.forbidden_stronger_claim: The amendment is malicious or intentionally harmful.
missing_evidence: Specific details on the severity of the tecINVARIANT_FAILED errors beyond their existence.
Current network adoption rate of the replacement amendment NonFungibleTokensV1_1.
